title: Harden T1000-E DFU port selection
description: Recover deterministic app/DFU serial-port selection, matching-device 1200-baud transition, explicit custom-port state, and ambiguity failures.
acceptance_criteria: Mocked zero/one/multiple and re-enumeration cases pass; direct DFU does not touch; app transition follows serial; bash syntax passes; one physical T1000-E flash succeeds.
